Locale.runsetwoodenstartdsc: Start with wooden prosthetics on all four limbs, a cyber eye (you need to find a battery tho), and a flimsy knife. Your int is 13 instead of 7 in singleplayer.
Locale.runsetdisablebrainmodsdsc: No neuromods or neuromod crates spawn this run, and traders won't stock neuromods.
Locale.prosthetic_arm_scrapdsc: An arm prosthetic made with scrap and wires. Maybe flesh isn't good enough for this place.
Locale.prosthetic_leg_scrapdsc: A leg prosthetic made with scrap and wires. Looks good enough to replace a missing leg.
Locale.prosthetic_arm_wooddsc: Cheap wooden arm. Brittle  - splinters into your stump when it breaks.
Locale.prosthetic_leg_wooddsc: Cheap wooden leg. Walking and jumping are slower. But you do feel like a pirate.
Locale.prosthetic_arm_titaniumdsc: Titanium arm. It doesn't feel like just a prosthetic; it feels like an improvement.
Locale.prosthetic_leg_titaniumdsc: Titanium leg. It doesn't feel like just a prosthetic; it feels like an improvement.
Locale.prosthetic_eyedsc: A battery-powered eye. Restores sight in one socket while it has charge. Press F to activate light mode.\n\nIn wound view: any tool (knife, screwdriver, etc) ejects the battery — wrench rips out the whole eye.
Locale.neuromod_painblockdsc: Suppresses nerve pain signals  - all incoming pain is halved while installed.\n\n<color="red">Ejecting this neuromod is dangerous. Expect brain flash and vomiting.
Locale.neuromod_trapdetectdsc: Highlights all nearby traps with a red glow. Beartraps, landmines, coils and more.\n\n<color="red">Ejecting this neuromod is dangerous. Expect brain flash and vomiting.
Locale.neuromod_sonicscreamerdsc: Allows the player to release a powerful sonic shockwave to push back and stun nearby enemies.
Locale.neuromod_crackedpainmoddsc: A damaged pain neuromod, clearly ripped from someone else. Pain hurts 10% more with it in, but you start enjoying it  - mood rises passively the more you hurt.\n\n<color="red">Removing this neuromod deals 5 brain damage, a brain flash, and 15 head pain.
Locale.neuromod_adrenalinesurgedsc: Triggers a strong adrenaline surge to temporarily improve survivability when actively activated or in a crisis state.
Locale.neuromod_sandivistiandsc: A neural mod implanted in the brain, allowing the player to greatly increase reaction and action speed for a short duration.
Locale.neuromod_scanningchipdsc: Hold an item and activate to scan it for 3 seconds. Reveals the recipe and marks the item type as recognized for good.\n\n<color="green">Safe to eject  - no side effects.
Locale.augment_steadyhanddsc: Fine-tunes the arm stability, significantly reducing weapon recoil and improving operational accuracy.
Locale.augment_powergripdsc: Enhances hand and arm grip strength, allowing climbing or grabbing heavy objects firmly.
Locale.augment_hackingdsc: Integrates a wireless hacking interface in the hand, allowing remote hacking of various electronic systems and terminals.
Locale.augment_implant_tooldsc: Cuts a single augment socket into a biological arm or leg — run augments without going full prosthetic. Use in the wound view on a Shoulder or Thigh.\n\n<color="red">Single use. Slot is gone the moment the limb is severed.
Locale.augment_powerstepsdsc: Reinforces leg muscles, enabling the player to run faster and jump higher.
Locale.bonesawdsc: A proper surgical bone saw. The right tool for a clean cut.\n\n<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate any limb, even without infection or damage.
Locale.makeshiftbonesawdsc: A crude improvised bone saw. Gets the job done, barely.\n\n<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate any limb, even without infection or damage.
Locale.rippeddressingdsc: A strip of clean bandage cloth. Absorbs 25 wetness per use when used from inventory. 10 uses. Also works as a proper dressing on wounds.
Locale.plasticforkdsc:
I mean, it would be funny to poke an eye out from your friend or yourself to make space for the cool prosthetic eye, right? One use.

<color="red">Drag onto your head in the health panel to remove a biological eye.
<color="green">Also pries out an installed prosthetic eye without breaking it.
Locale.grapplinghookdsc: A grappling hook device that can be fired to pull the player.
Locale.scrapdsc: A pile of scrap metal or electronic waste with no fixed purpose, can be used for crafting, upgrading, or recycling.
Locale.batterydsc: Standard power component to power various electronic prosthetics and modules.

Prosthetics*/Status.[Regex]^Could not reach update server.\n:
无法连接到更新服务器。
$1

Loose.A sealed augmentation-corp crate. Reinfo: 一个密封的增强公司物资箱。配有加固金属外板与原始的密码锁。里面装有一枚单独的神经模组——只要你能够将其破解打开。
